title: Taznel Mountains
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Taznel Mountains''' were a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] range on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brosi]], located to the north of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Treptel]]. The Tanzel Mountains were situated in the [[Brosin Underground]]'s area of influence around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
